title: 6 Sheet Christmas Window Stickers, Double Side Printed Christmas Window Stickers Decorations, Colorful Xmas Window Decor for Home School Office Decoration Christmas Holiday Supplies
features: 【Package Content】: You will get 6 pieces of fun Christmas window decals, so you can choose your favorite window decals to stick in different places. These window christmas stickers are great for your Christmas window display and add more Merry Christmas atmosphere.

【Vivid Christmas Window Stickers】: Don’t let your window fashion miss out on all the fun this Christmas! Our window stickers christmas scene have different unique designs, bright colors and clear printing. You can do so many wonderful DIY Christmas projects to attract your neighbors, friends and even get the favor of customers.

【Material】: The materials of christmas windows stickers decorations are made of high-quality electrostatic membrane PVC material, smooth and sturdy. which even if it is stickers in the wrong place, christmas decorations for windows can peel off and move easily without damage the glass and won't leave a sticky residue.

【Easy to Use】: You can spray some water on the window before use so the window appendages can stick to the window more firmly, peel off easily, and can be reused without leaving any marks when you tear the window open.

【Christmas Holiday Decorations】: Merry christmas window stickers are wonderful for Christmas Parties and Xmas birthday parties. Christmas window stickers for glass can be used in home, classroom, office, market, mirrors, cars and any glass you want to decorate. Christmas window decorations can create a perfect Christmas party atmosphere for you and your family!
